title: Aurora Polaris MVP Audit Event
description: Minimal audit and trace event contract. Payloads are represented by references; raw data is outside this minimal schema.

event_type.description: Event type from the approved MVP event set.

correlation_id.description: Identifier linking related request, policy, agent and release events.

actor.description: Triggering actor: user, system, module or reviewer. Taxonomy remains open.

input_ref.description: Reference to input, context or artifact. Raw input is outside this schema.

output_ref.description: Reference to output or artifact. Null is allowed when execution was blocked.

decision_ref.description: Reference to the related policy decision identifier.

confidence.description: Confidence value on a 0..1 scale, or null when not applicable.

risk_score.description: Risk score or risk class. Exact scale remains open in the source contract.

integrity_marker.description: Integrity marker for traceability. Exact construction remains open.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 date-time timestamp of the event.
